title: Phone is successfully registered to Cloud
scenario: Poly Lens app Account section shows mobile device correctly linked and appearing in lens server inventory list after login
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Lens app on the mobile device.
2. Log in using valid credentials (email and password).
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) in the top-left corner.
5. On the Lens server (web portal), navigate to the Inventory list.
6. Verify that the mobile device appears in the inventory list.
7. Verify that the mobile device is correctly linked to the proper Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., headset or speakerphone).
expected: The mobile app appears in the Lens server inventory list and is correctly linked to the proper Poly audio device (Android or iPhone).
